name: Teisin Lap (Plate Cake) (Bakestone Recipes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, baking powder, and nutmeg into a mixing bowl.
2. Cut the fat (butter and lard) into the flour and rub it until it resembles breadcrumbs.
3. Mix in the sugar and dried fruit.
4. Stir in the eggs and sufficient cream or buttermilk to make a soft dough.
5. Roll out the mixture to a thickness of 1 inch.
6. Cut into 2 1/2-inch rounds.
7. Cook on a warmed, greased bakestone for about 15 minutes on each side.
